description: Initialize the HR master data and staffing for the newly acquired 'Veterans Assistance Program' federal grant in Sentrifugo, referencing the configuration memo at ~/Desktop/grant_initialization_memo.txt. Establish the 'Veterans Assistance Program' department (code: 'VAP') and the job titles 'Veterans Case Manager' and 'Field Outreach Specialist'. Reassign Michael Johnson (EMP004) to the 'Veterans Case Manager' role and both Matthew Taylor (EMP016) and David Moore (EMP011) to the 'Field Outreach Specialist' role within the new department. Additionally, configure a 'Wellness & Respite Leave' type (code: 'WRL') with 5 days and a 'VAP Grant Holidays' group including 'Memorial Day' (May 25, 2026) and 'Veterans Day' (November 11, 2026). Ensure all records are active and correctly associated.
